descriptionTemplate: Doll: Inferno gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: At the end of the turn, recover [Heal:Arg2] HP and gain Aliemus equal to its own Aliemus Regen. {Finale Form}: No longer recovers HP; instead, inflicts {Poison} on all enemies at [Arg3]%.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Doll: Inferno gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: For each stack of {Finale}, DMG Amplification +8%. {Illusion's End} grants all Awakeners 30% Base Aliemus. At turn end, recover [Heal:Arg2] HP and gain Aliemus equal to the Aliemus Regen. {Finale Form}: No longer recover HP, instead trigger [Arg3]% {Poison} on all enemies.
